About Us

Built on Trust,
Crafted with Pride

CBR Construction is a Christchurch-based building company led by Lalith Kumara Waduge, a NZCB certified professional builder — committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and creating beautiful, enduring homes that blend modern style with lasting quality.

We combine trusted building techniques with modern design principles, working closely with our clients from first consultation through to final handover — because your dream home is our top priority.

NZCB Certified Member
Christchurch Local
Licensed Builder

What We Build

Our Services

From concept to completion — residential building solutions across Canterbury. Hover a card to learn more.

🏗️
Architectural Builds

Architectural Builds
Statement homes built to the highest specification. We bring your architect’s vision to life with precise, premium craftsmanship.
🏠

New Builds
Your dream home, built from the ground up. We manage every stage from foundations to final handover with care and full transparency.
🔨

Renovations
Transform your existing home into the space you’ve always wanted — kitchen, bathroom, full home. We do it all beautifully.
🏢

Multi-Unit Developments
Townhouses and multi-unit builds delivered on time and on budget. Quality at scale without compromise.
✏️

Design & Build
One team from design through to build. Streamlined communication, cohesive outcomes, and no surprises along the way.
🏡
Residential & Commercial

Residential & Commercial
Homes and commercial spaces built to the same exacting standard. Licensed, insured, and fully accountable.
🔧
Alterations

Alterations
Extensions, additions, and alterations that feel like they were always part of the original design. Seamless, precise work.
🌿

Decks & Outdoor Living
Beautiful outdoor spaces that extend your living area. Hardwood, composite, or treated — built to last a lifetime.
⚙️
Maintenance

Maintenance
Keep your home in top condition with our ongoing maintenance service. Trusted, reliable, and always on time.

How We Work

Our Process

01
💬
Consultation
We meet you, listen to your vision, understand your budget, and explore what’s possible for your project.
02
📐
Design & Plan
Detailed plans, specifications, and a transparent fixed-price quote. No hidden costs, no surprises.
03
🏗️
Build
Our skilled team brings your project to life with precision. Regular updates keep you informed every step.
04
🗝️
Handover
A thorough final inspection, full walkthrough, and keys in your hand. Your dream, delivered.

Meet the Builder

The Person Behind CBR

Lalith Kumara Waduge

Lalith brings passion, precision, and a genuine commitment to quality to every project. As a certified member of New Zealand Certified Builders, he holds himself to the highest professional standards — ensuring every CBR build is something both client and builder can be proud of for generations.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

We are based in Christchurch and primarily serve the Canterbury region. For the right project, we’re happy to discuss builds in wider New Zealand — get in touch to chat about your location.

Yes. CBR Construction is led by Lalith Kumara Waduge, a certified member of New Zealand Certified Builders (NZCB). This ensures your build is completed to the highest industry standards with full accountability and consumer protection.

Timelines vary depending on scope. A kitchen renovation may take 4–8 weeks, while a full new build typically ranges from 6–14 months. We provide detailed timelines at the quoting stage and keep you updated throughout.

Absolutely. CBR Construction carries full public liability insurance and all work is backed by the NZCB guarantee scheme, giving you peace of mind throughout and after your project.

Simply fill in the contact form below or click “Get a Free Quote” anywhere on this page. Lalith will get back to you within 24 hours to discuss your project. Initial consultations are completely free and obligation-free.

We specialise in residential work including new builds, renovations, architectural builds, multi-unit developments, design & build, alterations, decks, and ongoing maintenance. We also take on select commercial projects — contact us to discuss.
